name: Clean
description: Professional, understated, universally appropriate. Subtle shadows, smooth motion, rounded corners. The safe default.
personality: rounded + subtle elevation + smooth motion + thin borders + no gradients

decorators.clean-surface: Pure white (#FFFFFF) or near-black (#111111) depending on mode.
decorators.clean-nav: Minimal navigation with text links, no backgrounds.
decorators.clean-surface-raised: Slightly elevated surface for cards (2% darker/lighter).
decorators.clean-card: Bordered card with 1px border, 8px radius, no shadow at rest, subtle shadow on hover transition.
decorators.clean-input: Standard input with thin border, rounded corners, and blue focus ring using primary color.

flat.description: Borderless card with subtle background difference

bordered.description: Card with thin border, no shadow

clean-surface.description: Pure white (#FFFFFF) or near-black (#111111) depending on mode.
clean-surface.intent: Use as the root page background for the most neutral, universally appropriate foundation. Zero personality, maximum clarity.

clean-nav.description: Minimal navigation with text links, no backgrounds.
clean-nav.intent: Use for primary navigation that should be virtually invisible. Text links only, no backgrounds, no borders.

clean-surface-raised.description: Slightly elevated surface for cards (2% darker/lighter).
clean-surface-raised.intent: Use for content areas that need minimal visual separation from the background. The 2% shift is barely perceptible but creates hierarchy.

clean-card.description: Bordered card with 1px border, 8px radius, no shadow at rest, subtle shadow on hover transition.
clean-card.intent: Use for content containers that need clear but understated boundaries. Hover shadow adds interactivity without resting visual weight.

clean-input.description: Standard input with thin border, rounded corners, and blue focus ring using primary color.
clean-input.intent: Use for all form inputs. Standard styling with blue focus ring is universally appropriate and accessible.
